message: High-dose vitamin A (retinol) is teratogenic. Avoid during pregnancy; beta-carotene is a safer source if needed.
Vitamin E above 400 IU/day can increase bleeding risk when combined with anticoagulants.
Insufficient safety data in pregnancy; avoid.
Iron supplementation is contraindicated in hemochromatosis.
Kava has been linked to hepatotoxicity; contraindicated with liver disease.
